zh.lifeSummary: 當Edward IV King of England於1442年4月28日出生在法國豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利盧時，他的父親Richard of York 3rd Duke of York30歲，母親Cecily Neville26歲。他於1464年5月1日與Elizabeth Woodville Queen Consort of England在英國諾薩普頓史爾葛拉芙頓 雷吉結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他於1461年登記服兵役。他去世於1483年4月9日在英國米德萊可堂爾 本 倫敦享年40歲，埋葬在英國波克夏溫莎女爵聖 格奧智也斯 查阿培爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Edward IV King of England于1442年4月28日出生在法国豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利盧时，他的父亲Richard of York 3rd Duke of York30岁，母亲Cecily Neville26岁。他于1464年5月1日与Elizabeth Woodville Queen Consort of England在英国諾薩普頓史爾葛拉芙頓 雷吉结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他于1461年登记服兵役。他去世于1483年4月9日在英国米德萊可堂爾 本 倫敦享年40岁，埋葬在英国波克夏溫莎女爵聖 格奧智也斯 查阿培爾。

nameMeanings.name: Edward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

meanings: Short form of   Vivian   and   Vivien .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Edward IV King of England was born on 28 April 1442, in Rouen, Seine-Maritime, Upper Normandy, France, his father, Richard of York 3rd Duke of York, was 30 and his mother, Cecily Neville, was 26. He married Elizabeth Woodville Queen Consort of England on 1 May 1464, in Grafton Regis, Northamptonshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 7 daughters. He registered for military service in 1461. He died on 9 April 1483, in Tower of London, Middlesex, England, at the age of 40, and was buried in St George's Chapel, Windsor, Berkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Edward IV King of England est né le 28 avril 1442, à Rouen, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, France, son père, Richard of York 3rd Duke of York, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Cecily Neville, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Woodville Queen Consort of England le 1 mai 1464, à Grafton Regis, Northamptonshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 7 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1461. Il est décédé le 9 avril 1483, à Tower of London, Middlesex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 40 ans, et a été enterré à St George's Chapel, Windsor, Berkshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Edward IV King of England am 28. April 1442 in Rouen, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard of York 3rd Duke of York 30 und seine Mutter Cecily Neville 26. Er hat am 1. Mai 1464 in Grafton Regis, Northamptonshire, England Elizabeth Woodville Queen Consort of England geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Er hat sich 1461 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 9. April 1483 im Alter von 40 Jahren in Tower of London, Middlesex, England und wurde in St George's Chapel, Windsor, Berkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Edward IV King of England è nato il il 28 aprile 1442 nel Rouen, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Richard of York 3rd Duke of York, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Cecily Neville, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Woodville Queen Consort of England il 1 maggio 1464, nel Grafton Regis, Northamptonshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 7 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1461. Morì il 9 aprile 1483, nel Tower of London, Middlesex, England, all'età di 40 anni, e fu sepolto a St George's Chapel, Windsor, Berkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Edward IV King of Englandが1442年4月28日にフランスハウテ-ノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメロウンで生まれた時，父Richard of York 3rd Duke of Yorkは30歳，母Cecily Nevilleは26歳であった。1464年5月1日にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアグラフトン レジスでElizabeth Woodville Queen Consort of Englandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼は1461年に兵役登録をした。彼は1483年4月9日にイギリスミッドレセックストウエル オフ ロンドンで40歳で死去し，イギリスバークシュアイアウィンドソルスト ジョージェ'ス チャペルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Edward IV King of England(이)가 1442년 4월 28일 프랑스 하테-노먼디 세이인-마이팀 루언에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard of York 3rd Duke of York(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Cecily Neville(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1464년 5월 1일 영국 노르섬프토실르 그라프턴 레지스에서 Elizabeth Woodville Queen Consort of England(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1461년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1483년 4월 9일 영국 미들레세스 타워 프 런던에서 40세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 버크실르 윈드소르 스트 조그'스 차플에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Edward IV King of England nasceu em 28 de abril de 1442, em Rouen, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, França, seu pai, Richard of York 3rd Duke of York, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Cecily Neville, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Woodville Queen Consort of England em 1 de maio de 1464, em Grafton Regis, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 7 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1461. Ele faleceu em 9 de abril de 1483, em Tower of London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, com 40 anos, e foi sepultado em St George's Chapel, Windsor, Berkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Edward IV King of England родился 28 апреля 1442 г. в местности роуен, сине-маритим, хауте-норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Richard of York 3rd Duke of York было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Cecily Neville, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Woodville Queen Consort of England 1 мая 1464 г. в местности графтон регис, нортамптоншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 7 дочерей. В 1461 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 9 апреля 1483 г. в местности тоуир оф лондон, миддлесекс, Англия в возрасте 40 лет и был похоронен в местности ст джеорге'с чапел, виндзор, биркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Edward IV King of England nació el 28 de abril de 1442, en Rouen, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia, su papá, Richard of York 3rd Duke of York, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Cecily Neville, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Woodville Queen Consort of England el 1 de mayo de 1464, en Grafton Regis, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 7 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1461. Murió el 9 de abril de 1483, en Tower of London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 40 años, y fue sepultado en St George's Chapel, Windsor, Berkshire, Inglaterra.
